title: Bound tag/label cardinality
description: Keep tag value sets bounded; never put unbounded identifiers (user id, request id) in tags/labels.
body: Use when designing the measurement/series schema. Do not tag points with high-cardinality values (user id, UUID, full URL) — each unique combination creates a new series and cardinality grows multiplicatively. Actions: keep ids in fields (not tags), enumerate expected tag values, and inspect series cardinality after a representative load. Validation signals include total series count staying within the engine's tested budget and stable memory. Risk boundary: cardinality explosion degrades the whole instance, not one query — treat an unbounded tag as a blocking design defect.
